channel.title: Parlor Room
channel.description: Latest releases from Parlor Room on Dropout.tv

item.title: Monikers
item.description:
Monét X Change, Brennan, Ruha, Mano, and Rashawn play Monikers, the party game of guessing names.

Duration: 48:58

Tags: Parlor Room, becca scott, board games, party games, tabletop rpg, role playing, strategy, problem solving, shenanigans, monét x change, ruha taslimi, mano agapion, rashawn nadine scott, brennan lee mulligan

item.title: Cash 'N Guns
item.description:
Vic, Talia, Angela, Jacob, Kimia, and Lou play Cash 'N Guns, the party game of bluff and gangsters.

Duration: 38:04

Tags: Parlor Room, becca scott, board games, party games, tabletop rpg, role playing, strategy, problem solving, shenanigans, vic michaelis, talia tabin, angela giarratana, jacob wysocki, kimia behpoornia, lou wilson
